---
title: "Curriculum Vitae"
description: "Academic curriculum vitae of Gabriel Frazer-McKee."
toc: false
body-classes: cv-page
---

::: {.cv-intro}

A web version of my academic curriculum vitae, automatically synchronized with my ORCID record.

[Download CV as PDF](files/cv.pdf){.btn .btn-primary}

:::

{{< include _generated/cv-orcid.md >}}
